sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُ لِمَعْرِفَةِ أَسَاسِيَّاتِ الْإِسْعَافَاتِ الْأَوَّلِيَّةِ أَنْ تُسَاهِمَ فِي إِنْقَاذِ الْأَرْوَاحِ عِنْدَ وُقُوعِ الْحَوَادِثِ.
sentences.translation: Poznavanje osnova prve pomoći može doprinijeti spašavanju života prilikom nezgoda.
sentences.translationEn: Knowledge of first aid basics can contribute to saving lives when accidents occur.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى كُلِّ فَرْدٍ تَعَلُّمُ كَيْفِيَّةِ التَّعَامُلِ مَعَ الْجُرُوحِ، وَالْحُرُوقِ، وَحَالَاتِ الْإِغْمَاءِ الْمُفَاجِئِ.
sentences.translation: Svaki pojedinac treba naučiti kako postupati s ranama, opekotinama i slučajevima iznenadne nesvjestice.
sentences.translationEn: Every individual should learn how to deal with wounds, burns, and cases of sudden fainting.

sentences.arabic: الْحِفَاظُ عَلَى الْهُدُوءِ وَالتَّصَرُّفُ بِحِكْمَةٍ هُمَا أَمْرَانِ جَوْهَرِيَّانِ لِتَقْدِيمِ الْمُسَاعَدَةِ الصَّحِيحَةِ لِلْمُصَابِ.
sentences.translation: Očuvanje smirenosti i mudro postupanje su dvije suštinske stvari za pružanje ispravne pomoći povrijeđenom.
sentences.translationEn: Maintaining calmness and acting wisely are two essential things for providing the correct assistance to the injured person.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ أَيْضًا تَوْفِيرُ حَقِيبَةِ إِسْعَافَاتٍ مُتَكَامِلَةٍ فِي الْمَنْزِلِ وَفِي وَسَائِلِ النَّقْلِ.
sentences.translation: Također je neophodno obezbijediti kompletnu torbu prve pomoći u kući i u prijevoznim sredstvima.
sentences.translationEn: It is also necessary to provide a complete first aid kit at home and in transportation vehicles.

sentences.arabic: التَّدْرِيبُ الْمُسْتَمِرُّ يُعْطِي الثِّقَةَ اللَّازِمَةَ لِلتَّدَخُّلِ السَّرِيعِ وَالْفَعَّالِ فِي مَوَاقِفِ الطَّوَارِئِ.
sentences.translation: Kontinuirana obuka daje potrebnu samouvjerenost za brzu i efikasnu intervenciju u hitnim situacijama.
sentences.translationEn: Continuous training gives the necessary confidence for quick and effective intervention in emergency situations.
